esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-mongodbreceiver.otel-default
// Scope to MongoDB OTel metrics
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "mongodbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.mongodb.connection.count IS NOT NULL AND attributes.type == "available"
// Minimum available connections per (server, database); then worst per server
| STATS avail = MIN(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.mongodb.connection.count)) BY resource.attributes.server.address, attributes.db.namespace
| STATS min_avail = MIN(avail) BY resource.attributes.server.address
// Alert when available connections drop below threshold (adjust 10 for your pool size)
| WHERE min_avail < 10
| SORT min_avail ASC
| LIMIT 20
